name: Content Pipeline
description: Automated viral clip pipeline: YouTube → AI analysis → clip → publish to TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels

googleApiKey.description: Google Gemini API key for AI analysis

lateApiKey.description: Late.dev API key for social publishing

niche.description: Content niche for scoring (e.g. cannabis, tech, gaming)

events.name: pipeline_complete
events.description: Fires when a video pipeline finishes processing

events.name: clip_published
events.description: Fires when a clip is published to a social platform

events.name: creator_new_video
events.description: Fires when a tracked creator uploads a new video

actions.name: Process Video
actions.description: Run the full clipping pipeline on a YouTube URL

actions.name: Publish Clip
actions.description: Publish a clip to social platforms

actions.name: Schedule Clip
actions.description: Schedule a clip for future posting

actions.name: Add Creator
actions.description: Track a YouTube creator for new videos

examples.prompt: publish clip 1 from the last run to tiktok and instagram
check for new videos from tracked creators
